expectations.text: Proposes organizing files by type (documents, images, spreadsheets, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Financial, Images, Documents, Archives categories plus keyword-based categories

expectations.text: Suggests a date-based or descriptive naming convention
Provides a script or code to perform the organization
expectations.evidence: Complete script with categorize_file, safe_move, organize functions

expectations.text: Uses pathlib or shutil for file operations (not raw os.system calls)
Handles edge cases like duplicate filenames
expectations.evidence: safe_move function appends _1, _2 counter for existing files
